description: Phase 10 T6: register-resident PV in NEON attention (AttentionVarlenBhNeon). Holds each 16-float output chunk's accumulators in registers across all keys, writes out_row once per chunk (was a per-key load-modify-store). Weights prescaled by inv_sum once. ESM_PROFILE attention-section, 650M uniform 8x256, M3 Pro.

attention_section_ms.reduction: ~28% on the attention section (~27% of forward) -> ~7-8% e2e

correctness: All 7 attention cross-checks green (AttentionVarlenNeon vs Ref across ESM head_dims 16/24/32/64 + large-score guard) at the unchanged 1e-4 tolerance; full ctest 125/125.
note: PV memory ops cut ~3x (no per-key out_row load+store). Helps every ARM host and scales with sequence length. e2e total-wall is dominated by +-10% thermal variance (2520-2826ms across runs) so the profile section is the clean signal.
